Object.assign.description: `Object.assign`, or if deep clones are needed, use `structuredClone`

airbnb-js-shims.description: Every modern environment has native support for all of the APIs included in this library.

es-errors.description: `Error` and its subclasses are natively built into all modern environments.

es-string-html-methods.description: All the methods exported by this modules are generally available on the `String` prototype in modern environments.

es5-shim.description: Every modern environment has support for ES5 APIs.

es6-shim.description: Every modern environment has support for ES6/ES2015 APIs.

es7-shim.description: Every modern environment has support for ES7/ES2016 apis.

has-bigints.description: Every modern environment has support for `BigInt`. You can just remove the check.

has-dynamic-import.description: Every modern environment has support for dynamic `import()`. You can just remove the check.

has-optional-chaining.description: Every modern environment has support for optional chaining. You can just remove the check.

has-property-descriptors.description: Every modern environment has full property descriptor support. You can just remove the check.

has-proto.description: Every modern environment has support for `__proto__`. You can just remove the check.

has-symbols.description: Every modern environment has support for `Symbol`. You can just remove the check.

has-template-literals.description: Every modern environment has support for template literals. You can just remove the check.

has-tostringtag.description: Every modern environment has support for `Symbol.toStringTag`. You can just remove the check.

has-typed-arrays.description: Every modern environment has support for typed arrays. You can just remove the check.

safe-buffer.description: All modern versions of Node have `Buffer.from` for safely creating buffers from arbitrary types.
